title: craspedia glauca var. macrocephala
intro: Craspedia glauca var. macrocephala, also known as the Billy Button or Woollyhead, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its yellow button-like flowers and woolly leaves. The medicinal properties of Craspedia glauca var. macrocephala include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and support immune function, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin regeneration. Craspedia glauca var. macrocephala can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
